description: A case has concluded, and a paralegal needs to perform the administrative steps to close the matter.

nodes.task_description: Ensure all final time entries have been submitted and the final bill has been sent and paid.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the financial aspects of the matter are complete.

nodes.task_description: Organize and archive the electronic case file according to firm policy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent moves the case file to the firm's long-term archive.

nodes.task_description: Change the status of the matter to 'Closed' in the case management system.

expected_outcome.value: The matter is officially marked as closed.
